backstory.original: Valentine comes from a life of leisure. Once a social butterfly, nightlife connoisseur, and princess of the shady family business but that life ended in sudden tragedy. Through the mysterious will of Bluetspur, Valentine was given a second chance at life, though no miracle comes without consequence. Now she wanders the domains of dread with her companion Tatyana, in search of purpose and power.
backstory.display: 瓦伦汀来自富足悠闲的生活环境。她曾经是一只社交花蝴蝶、夜生活鉴赏家，以及灰色家族产业的小公主，但这样的生活突然以悲剧落幕。借助布鲁兹波的神秘意志，瓦伦汀获得了第二次生命机会，但所有奇迹都要付出代价。如今，她和伙伴塔季扬娜游荡在恐惧领域中，旨在寻找目标和力量。

description.original: Valentine attacks a random enemy with a mental magic attack, which deals damage and has a chance to stun them.
description.display: 瓦伦汀使用精神魔法攻击一名随机敌人，造成伤害并有几率使其眩晕。

longDescription.original: Valentine attacks a random enemy with a mental magic attack for one hit and enemies have a 50% chance that they are stunned for 2 seconds.
longDescription.display: 瓦伦汀使用精神魔法攻击一名随机敌人，造成一次伤害并有 50% 几率使其眩晕 2 秒。

description.original: Valentine targets the nearest enemy and those around it dealing damage and stunning them. While stunned they take additional damage.
description.display: 瓦伦汀瞄准最近的敌人及其周围的敌人，造成伤害并使其眩晕。眩晕期间，他们受到额外伤害。

longDescription.original: Inky black tentacles erupt from Valentine's mouth and hands targeting the closest enemy and those around it dealing damage and stunning them for 4-8 seconds. While stunned they take an additional 1000% damage from all sources.
longDescription.display: 瓦伦汀的嘴巴和双手中伸出黑色触须，瞄准最近的敌人及其周围的敌人，造成伤害并使其眩晕 4-8 秒。眩晕期间，他们额外受到 1000% 所有来源的伤害。

description.original: Valentine buffs all DPS Champions based on the number of positional formation abilities affecting Valentine.
description.display: 瓦伦汀根据影响瓦伦汀的位置阵型技能的数量来强化所有伤害输出勇士。

description.original: Valentine duplicates positional formation abilities targetting her to DPS Champions, she does this after Artemis has Observed them.
description.display: 瓦伦汀将以她为目标的位置阵型技能复制给伤害输出勇士（在阿尔忒弥斯观察过他们之后实行）。

description.desc: The aberrant spirit in $(source_hero)'s brain telepathically reaches out to the other Champions. For each positional formation ability affecting $(source_hero), she increases the damage of all Champions with the $(describe_tags target_tags___2) role by $(amount)%, stacking multiplicatively.
$(source_hero)大脑中的异常灵魂通过心灵感应传递给其他勇士。每个影响$(source_hero)的位置阵型技能都会让她使所有$(describe_tags target_tags___2)角色的勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Valentine buffs all DPS Champions based on the number of positional formation abilities affecting her
tipText.display: 瓦伦汀根据影响她的位置阵型技能的数量来强化所有伤害输出勇士。

description.desc: $(source_hero) duplicates any positional formation abilities that are affecting her to Champions in the formation with the $(describe_tags tag) role. If the receiving Champion already has the formation ability, the formation ability is instead boosted by $(amount)%. This happens after Artemis' Observation ability.
$(source_hero)将影响她的任何位置阵型技能复制给阵型中的$(describe_tags tag)角色勇士。如果获得技能的勇士已拥有该阵型技能，则此阵型技能强化 $(amount)%这发生在阿尔忒弥斯的观察技能之后。

tipText.original: Valentine duplicates positional formation abilities affecting her on DPS Champions. This happens after Artemis' Observation ability.
tipText.display: 瓦伦汀将影响她的位置阵型技能复制给伤害输出勇士。这发生在阿尔忒弥斯的观察技能之后。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the formation's gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each positional formation ability affecting her, stacking multiplicatively.
每个影响$(source_hero)的位置阵型技能都让她使阵型的金币寻获数量提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
$(upgrade_name id)'s pre-stack damage increase is increased by $(amount)%.
$(upgrade_name id)的叠加前伤害提高效果提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Valentine focuses on helping other Champions deal as much damage as possible
specializationDescription.display: 瓦伦汀专注于帮助其他勇士尽量造成更多伤害

description.desc: If $(source_hero) is affected by $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability, its effect is increased by $(amount)%.
如果$(source_hero)受到$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能影响，则其效果提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Valentine focuses on being a great friend to Tatyana
specializationDescription.display: 瓦伦汀专注于担任塔季扬娜的好朋友

description.desc: $(upgrade_name id)'s total gold find is increased by $(amount)%.

specializationDescription.original: Valentine focuses on the business side of things
specializationDescription.display: 瓦伦汀专注于商业方面

description.original: Let me explain how this is going to work.
It's good to know where to spend your coin.
description.display: 你最好知道自己把钱花在哪里。

description.original: Sometimes good things come of bad circumstances.
Don't mind the little voice in your head.
description.display: 不要介意你脑子里的小声音。

description.original: I had to put in an appearance.
Don't you want to be stronger?
With an aberrant spirit, you're never really alone.
description.display: 异常灵魂让你永远不孤单。

description.original: What good is coin if you don't spend it?
I've glimpsed what lurks beyond the shadows.
description.display: 我窥见了隐藏在暗影背后的东西。

description.original: What do you think happens when your little blade hits my darkness?
description.display: 当你的小刀击中我的黑暗时，你觉得会发生什么？

description.original: Huh. Well, at least I still look good in black.
description.display: 哈，嗯，至少我穿黑色还是很好看。

effects.description: Valentine also counts as Air Genasi

character_sheet_details.backstory: Valentine comes from a life of leisure. Once a social butterfly, nightlife connoisseur, and princess of the shady family business but that life ended in sudden tragedy. Through the mysterious will of Bluetspur, Valentine was given a second chance at life, though no miracle comes without consequence. Now she wanders the domains of dread with her companion Tatyana, in search of purpose and power.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Valentine is a Support Gold Find Champion that can share positional formation abilities with DPS Champions

event_upgrades.name: Tregrum
event_upgrades.description: Valentine buffs all DPS Champions based on the number of positional formation abilities affecting Valentine.

event_upgrades.name: Socialite
event_upgrades.description: Valentine duplicates positional formation abilities targetting her to DPS Champions, she does this after Artemis has Observed them.
